title: Aetherion
description: With this modpack, you can immerse yourself in RPG worlds in your Minecraft.
body:
# About the Modpack
Aetherion is a Minecraft RPG modpack featuring races and classes

# In this modpack, you'll find
- New classes
- New races
- New armor and weapons
- New world generation and structures
- New textures and animations
- Pale Garden added
- New dimensions
- Companions
- Bosses
- Good optimization and visuals

and much more awaits you in Aetherion
